headerDisplay: Control Teufel Raumfeld multiroom speakers from Apple HomeKit, with AirPlay streaming from iOS. Zone groups are created in the Raumfeld app and mirrored here.
footerDisplay: Restart Homebridge after saving. Groups are imported live from the Raumfeld host; members are locked in HomeKit while a group is active.

autoDiscover.title: Auto-discover host
autoDiscover.description: Find the Raumfeld host automatically via SSDP.

host.title: Raumfeld host
host.description: IP or hostname of the Raumfeld host. Ignored when auto-discover is on.

enabled.title: Enable AirPlay streaming
enabled.description: Expose zones as AirPlay 2 receivers for iOS.

binaryPath.title: shairport-sync path
binaryPath.description: Path to the shairport-sync binary that provides the AirPlay receiver. Must be installed on the Homebridge host. Leave as the default to find it on PATH.

streamHost.title: Stream host (advanced)
streamHost.description: IP/hostname the speakers use to reach this Homebridge machine's audio stream. Leave blank to auto-detect. Set it if Homebridge and the speakers are on different subnets.

streamPort.title: Stream port (advanced)
streamPort.description: TCP port for the local audio stream server the speakers pull from.

devices.title: Devices exposed to HomeKit
devices.description: Populated from discovery. Toggle a device off to hide it from HomeKit.
